style_rules.description: For formal events without a jacket or blazer, you must wear a tie or bow tie.
Outdoor events require outerwear (jacket, coat, or vest).
Each outfit should have an average quality rating of at least 3.5 stars.
Try to include at least one garment in a color the client prefers.
Each garment can only be used in one outfit across all events.
For black-tie events, the outfit must include either a dress or a blazer.
No two outfits should share the same color shoes.
